title: Campaigning — Anna Gelderd MP
meta_description: Keep up to date with camapaigns in South East Cornwall including Liskeard Post Office & Tamar Tolls.
text_excerpt: Campaigning — Anna Gelderd MP 0 Skip to Content Home About News Contact Campaigning Surgeries Help & Resources FAQs Newsletter Open Menu Close Menu Home About News Contact Campaigning Surgeries Help & Resources FAQs Newsletter Open Menu Close Menu Home About News Contact Campaigning Surgeries Help & Resources FAQs Newsletter Campaigning for South East Cornwall “From fairer Tamar tolls to saving NHS dental services, I’m standing up for the issues that matter most to our community. Here’s where you can follow my latest campaigns, see how to get involved, and read about the progress we’re making together.” Guest User 11/03/2019 Guest User 11/03/2019 Save Liskeard Post Office The Post Office has announced that all directly managed branches will move to a fully franchised model by this autumn, with the aim of creating a more sustainable national network and increasing income for local postmasters. Read More Guest User 11/03/2019 Guest User 11/03/2019 Tamar Tolls The Tamar Bridge and Torpoint Ferry are lifelines for South East Cornwall. I’ve made it a priority since being elected to fight for a fairer, more sustainable tolling system that puts local people first.
